domain: warehouse logistics, carts, conveyor accessories, pallet handling, tote systems, and material-flow hardware

ideas.product_context: Used along roller or belt conveyors in warehouses to keep cartons, totes, and trays aligned during transport.
ideas.core_function: Provides a rigid mounting point for a side guide rail with slotted adjustment for product width changes.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined L-shaped bracket with elongated slots, clamp face, gusset ribs, and rail-mount holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests slots, orthogonal mounting faces, rib-like reinforcements, clearance offsets, and repeated hole patterns in a functional industrial bracket.

ideas.product_context: Installed at conveyor transfer points to stop or release pallets in controlled sequence.
ideas.core_function: Rotates into the pallet path to block movement, then retracts when actuated by a cylinder or motor.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined pivot arm with a boss, through-bore, stop pad face, actuator linkage hole, and relieved edges.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests rotational geometry, concentric bores, offset linkage features, contact faces, and asymmetric load-bearing shape.

ideas.product_context: Mounted on workstations or carts to position plastic totes repeatably for scanning, picking, or robotic handling.
ideas.core_function: Locates the tote base using raised edges, corner reliefs, and chamfered lead-in surfaces.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat machined plate with shallow pockets, raised locating pads, corner cutouts, countersunk mounting holes, and chamfers.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests shallow pocketing, multiple height levels, chamfers, countersinks, and geometry that must match a container footprint.

ideas.product_context: Used on warehouse carts, picking trolleys, and material handling dollies for reinforced caster attachment.
ideas.core_function: Holds a caster wheel or swivel assembly while transferring cart load into the frame.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined fork-style yoke with two parallel lugs, axle holes, top mounting flange, and internal wheel clearance.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests forked geometry, mirrored lug features, coaxial holes, internal clearances, fillets, and load-path proportions.

ideas.product_context: Supports the end of a conveyor roller in a frame rail for carton or tote transport systems.
ideas.core_function: Holds a bearing or bushing concentric to the roller shaft while fastening into the conveyor side frame.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined bearing block with circular bearing pocket, shaft clearance bore, side mounting holes, and locating shoulder.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests nested cylindrical features, bearing seats, concentric holes, rectangular-to-round transitions, and precision mounting geometry.

ideas.product_context: Attached to pallet handling fixtures or automated pallet dispensers to guide forklift tines into position.
ideas.core_function: Funnels fork tips into the correct channel while protecting pallet edges and fixture structure.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined tapered guide shoe with flared entry ramps, bolt holes, wear face, and underside relief.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests tapered solids, angled lead-in faces, wear surfaces, countersunk fasteners, and robust industrial proportions.

ideas.idea_title: Modular Flow Rack Lane Divider Clamp
ideas.product_context: Used on carton flow racks to create adjustable lanes for bins, totes, or small cartons.
ideas.core_function: Clamps onto a cross tube or extrusion and supports a vertical lane divider rail.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined split clamp block with semicircular tube bore, pinch bolt holes, divider slot, and mounting boss.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests split clamp geometry, partial cylindrical cuts, slot-and-boss relationships, fastener clearances, and adjustable hardware logic.

ideas.product_context: Mounted at conveyor intersections where totes change direction or pass near frame corners.
ideas.core_function: Deflects tote edges smoothly around a corner to prevent snagging and impact damage.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined curved deflector block with radiused outer face, mounting flange, countersunk holes, and relieved backside.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests curved contact surfaces, blended radii, flange integration, asymmetric mounting, and collision-avoidance geometry.

ideas.idea_title: Pallet Lift Table Scissor Link Plate
ideas.product_context: Part of a warehouse lift table or pallet positioner used to raise loads for ergonomic picking.
ideas.core_function: Connects scissor lift pivots while maintaining spacing and carrying compressive and bending loads.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined flat link plate with large pivot bores, spacer bosses, lightening pockets, and rounded ends.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests long structural plates, repeated pivot features, large-radius ends, pocketing, and symmetry around a load-bearing centerline.

ideas.idea_title: Cart Handle Height Adjustment Index Plate
ideas.product_context: Used on warehouse picking carts or mobile workstations with adjustable push handles.
ideas.core_function: Provides indexed locking positions for a handle bracket at multiple ergonomic heights.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined sector plate with arc-pattern locking holes, central pivot bore, stop tab, and frame mounting holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests radial hole arrays, angular constraints, pivot-centered geometry, tabs, and real adjustment mechanics.
